data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): The Read/reference instruction for complexity-gate.md must use an absolute or repo-root-relative path. Use PLUGIN_ROOT or _PLUGIN_ROOT resolved via BASH_SOURCE pattern — do NOT hardcode 'plugins/dso/' literal paths (violates plugin-self-ref rule). Correct pattern: resolve path as $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md or via _PLUGIN_ROOT variable. Add AC: the path resolution must work from any CWD (worktree or repo root).
